name: @representative/feature-enrolment
description: React feature workflow package for enrolment screens and user interaction composition.

readme.summary: React feature workflow package for enrolment screens and user interaction composition.
responsibilities: Own enrolment workflow composition and feature-level React state
Consume domain rules and GraphQL contract operations through public exports
Expose feature entry points for application routing
nonResponsibilities: Does not own transport, cache client creation, or generated GraphQL schema files
Does not contain reusable design-system primitives
Does not own cross-context domain policy
usage: Import from the React app shell through public feature exports
Use contract and domain packages as dependencies
Keep adapter integration at the edge of the feature boundary
operationalNotes: Feature packages prove workflow ownership without taking adapter or domain ownership
